title: Krieg Unleashes Poison Gas
scene: On pages 9–12, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg prepares poison gas, forcing enemies and allies alike to face the cruelty of his warfare.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: There's no need to listen to a big coward like him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll send him flying this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don't you dare insult Don Krieg!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don Krieg is the strongest man. You don't have a chance of beating him.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Hey! Open your eyes already! That man is trying to kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I'm just a failure who broke his crew's code of law because his compassionate got in the way...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Crap, dive and swim away as far as you can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn it, the poison gas isn't even here yet and I still can't move...!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
